description: Freshdesk is a customer support and help desk platform for managing tickets, agents, customers, and related support workflows. Freshworks also provides a developer platform for building and submitting apps that integrate with Freshdesk and other Freshworks products.
summary: Freshdesk exposes a tenant-scoped REST API, plus Freshworks developer tooling via an MCP server and the FDK CLI; no public GraphQL surface was found.
